context.audience: Developers building tools for other developers, indie hackers creating CLI tools and IDE extensions, teams building internal developer platforms and SDKs
pain_points: Designing developer-friendly APIs and SDKs that are intuitive to use
Building CLI tools with good UX, error messages, and cross-platform support
Marketing and distribution strategies for developer tools
Monetization models for developer tools including open-core and freemium
Integrating AI features into developer tools without breaking existing workflows
